title: Dropped Item Tweaks
description: Small changes to the way dropped items render (includes UHC Overlay)
body: # Dropped Item Tweaks Allows customizing the look of dropped items. Purely visual! ## Features - Static Dropped Items - Removes the bobbing up/down effect, making dropped items only rotate in place. - Dropped Stack Item Count - Allows customizing the amount of dropped items of a stack shown. Vanilla only shows up to 5 at a time depending on the amount of items, while this can allow you to go up to 64. - Unlike vanilla, this will show the exact number of items specified, while vanilla scales the amount of items shown depending on how many items are in the stack. This can still be disabled in config. - Item Scale - The default scale of dropped items. - Custom Item Scale - A secondary item scale for a custom list of items. Commonly used for UHC overlays, as you can set a custom scale for heads, gold, etc.
